query: Compare Tavily, Serper, and Brave Search APIs for LLM agents in terms of pricing and features.
answerA: Tavily, Serper, and Brave Search APIs differ in pricing and features; Tavily is known for structured data, Serper offers Google-quality results at a lower cost, and Brave Search emphasizes privacy and independent indexing.
